title: July 21
content:
<noinclude>{{Top|real|nocat=1}}
{{Month|July}}

'''July 21''' is the 202nd day (203rd in leap years) of the year, with 163 days remaining.</noinclude>

*[[1950s#1952|1952]] – [[Kathy Tyers]] is born.
*[[1972]] – [[Gary Whitta]] is born.
*[[1981]] – [[Star Wars (1977) 52|''Star Wars'' (1977) 52]] published
*[[1985]] – [[Vanessa Lengies]] is born.
*[[1998]] – ''[[The Essential Guide to Planets and Moons]]'' published.
*[[1999]] – [[Episode I: The Phantom Menace ½|''Episode I: The Phantom Menace'' ½]] published.
*1999 – ''[[Star Wars Handbook 2: Crimson Empire]]'' published.
*[[2003]] – ''[[Jedi: Yoda]]'' published.
*[[2005]] – [[Long John Baldry]] dies.
*[[2009]] – ''[[Rebellion Era Campaign Guide]]'' published.
*[[2010]] – ''[[Star Wars Adventures: The Will of Darth Vader]]'' published.
*[[2011]] – ''[[Star Wars: The Old Republic]]'' becomes available for pre-order.
*[[2014]] – ''[[Star Wars Rebels: The Visual Guide]]'' published.
*2014 – ''[[Ultimate Sticker Collection: Star Wars Rebels]]'' published.
*[[2015]] – [[Star Wars Insider 159|''Star Wars Insider'' 159]] published.
*[[2020]] – ''[[Doctor Aphra: An Audiobook Original]]'' released.
*2020 – ''[[Star Wars: Galaxy's Edge: Traveler's Guide to Batuu]]'' published physically.
*2020 – ''[[Star Wars Legends Epic Collection: Legacy Vol. 3]]'' published.
*[[2021]] – [[The High Republic Adventures (2021) 6|''The High Republic Adventures'' (2021) 6]] published.
*2021 – [[Darth Vader (2020) 14|''Darth Vader'' (2020) 14]] published.
*2021 – [[War of the Bounty Hunters – Jabba the Hutt 1|''War of the Bounty Hunters – Jabba the Hutt'' 1]] published.
*[[2026]] – ''[[Eyes Like Stars]]'' to be published.
*2026 – [[Eyes Like Stars (audiobook)|''Eyes Like Stars'' audiobook]] to be released.
*2026 –'' [[Master of Evil]]'' to be reprinted in paperback.
*2026 – ''[[Star Wars Legends: The Newspaper Strips Omnibus]]'' to be published.
*2026 – ''[[Star Wars Modern Era Epic Collection: The Screaming Citadel]]'' to be published.
*2026 – ''[[LEGO Star Wars: Meet Grogu]]'' to be published.
*2026 – ''[[The Mandalorian and Child 2027 Wall Calendar]]'' to be published.
